use_cases: Displaying status labels or categories on content items
Showing notification counts or small numerical indicators
Tagging items with metadata or labels
Indicating version numbers or small state information
Highlighting special conditions like destructive or secondary states
ai_summary: A lightweight badge component with four variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) using Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant props. Features rounded pill styling, hover color transitions, and accessible focus rings. Designed as an atomic component for displaying status indicators, labels, or small metadata throughout applications.
